top_candidates.reward_code_head:
def compute_reward(obs, action, next_obs, done, info):
    components = {}
    # component: shaping
    component_0 = float(3.0 * np.exp(-3.0 * np.sqrt(obs[0]**2 + obs[1]**2)))
    component_0 = max(min(component_0, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['shaping'] = float(component_0)
    # component: velocity_penalty
    component_1 = float(-0.15 * (abs(obs[2]) + abs(obs[3])))
    component_1 = max(min(component_1, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['velocity_penalty'] = float(component_1)
    # component: angle_penalty
    component_2 = float(-0.1 - 0.05 * (abs(obs[4]) + 0.5 * abs(obs[5])))
    component_2 = max(min(component_2, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['angle_penalty'] = float(component_2)
    # component: fuel_efficiency
    component_3 = float(-0.0)
    component_3 = max(min(component_3, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['fuel_efficiency'] = float(component_3)
    # component: terminal
    component_4 = float(2000.0 * float(done and obs[6] > 0.5 and obs[7] > 0.5 and abs(obs[0]) < 0.15 and abs(obs[1]) < 0.15 and abs(obs[2]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[3]) < 0.5 and abs(obs[4]) < 0.3) + 0.5 * np.exp(-2.0 * abs(obs[1])) * np.exp(-0.5 * (abs(obs[2]) + abs(obs[3]))))
    component_4 = max(min(component_4, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    components['terminal'] = float(component_4)
    total_reward = component_0 + component_1 + component_2 + component_3 + component_4
    total_reward = max(min(total_reward, 1000.0), -1000.0)
    return float(total_reward), components
top_candidates.llm_rationale: The previous generation (g5) dramatically improved private_eval_return from -120.9 to -10.8 by increasing shaping, but the agent still fails to land (terminal reward 0.0). The angle penalty at -243.9 is now the dominant negative component, likely preventing the agent from making the final descent. To fix this: (1) reduce angle penalty per-step survival from -0.3 to -0.1 and angle scaling from 0.2 to 0.05, targeting -50 to -80 per episode; (2) reduce shaping multiplier from 5.0 to 3.0 so shaping (~900) is about 60% of terminal bonus (1500); (3) keep velocity penalty at -0.15 to target -20 per episode; (4) increase terminal bonus from 1500 to 2000 and soften landing angle tolerance from 0.2 to 0.3 radians; (5) add a soft landing bonus of 0.5 * exp(-2.0*|y|) * exp(-0.5*(|vx|+|vy|)) to bridge proximity and touchdown.
